# Analysis — Predictive History · Volume VII — Essays: The US-Iran War, Round Two

- **substack_slug:** `the-us-iran-war-round-two`
- **canonical_url:** https://predictivehistory.substack.com/p/the-us-iran-war-round-two
- **publication_date:** 2026-04-18

- **crosswalk:** [substack/README.md](../substack/README.md) (newest section — follows **World War Trump** in publication order)
- **analyzed_at:** *(operator)*

## Thesis / aim

Frames **round two** after a **false-dawn** week (Lebanon ceasefire, Hormuz open, oil down) that **reverses** after Friday: **bombing** rhetoric, **Lebanon** breakdown, **Hormuz** closed again — then argues **Trump** signals a **long war** (**Pentagon** budget, **draft** auto-registration, **defense** industrial **drone** lines). **Congress** failure theater on **war powers** (House **one-vote** margin, **Massie** / **Golden** roles) sits beside a **global** **game of chicken** over **energy**/**fertilizer** and **refinery** fires (**Geelong** / **Albanese** detail as **stress** vignette).

The analytic core is a **three-pillar** US strategy: **economic strangulation**, **ethnic** **fission**, **Tehran** **suffocation** — with **GW Bush**-era **force** levels, **Kharg**/**Qasem** **seizure**, **FOB**-enabled **insurgency** (**Kurd**/**Baloch**), and **civilian** **grid** targeting justified by **“Gaza”** as precedent. Long sections tie **learned helplessness** (**Mayer**/**Seligman**, **Gaza** **corrals**) to a contrasted **Tehran** aim: **anger** + **color-revolution** **playbook** fused with **shock-and-awe** service denial — a hypothesized **21st-century** **war form**.
